title: poa quadrata
intro: Poa quadrata, also known as the Square-leaved Meadow-grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and reducing pain. The health benefits of Poa quadrata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Poa quadrata is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
